{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041813FC6EDAA67CDBF71C090D"}"},"total":3582},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7064933738421551904","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉很好看。我看到40多张了，给我的感觉就是有耐心往下看，越看越有味道。苗疆的巫蛊，还有狐仙落花洞女。这些民间故事都是我非常喜欢的，恰好在这本书里都有。最重要的是作者文笔非常好，对书里每一个人物的刻画都非常的鲜明。主角和小狐狸的那份感情让人看了主角和小狐狸的那份感情让人看了会感觉心中柔软，还有那个王霸天。这家伙逗比起来的时候，真的能让你笑的前仰后合。总的来说呢，在这作者的笔下，每一个人物都能让你记住。这一点是挺难得的，比那些无脑爽文还是要强的太多了。最后祝作者元宵节快乐！","text_exts":[{"e":57,"s":53,"text":"民间故事","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B0%91%E9%97%B4%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774210693F71C090D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227064933738421551904%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227039592586117385249%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B0%91%E9%97%B4%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644933072,"group_id":"7039592586117385249","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Mkh8uF4A3GC1nAwNGvEIM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/29c42395aec7494a98ef46656527efc8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791792&x-signature=gZJTR%2BPKSCkKpNCsizSRHgLCBew%3D","user_id":"69950018169","user_name":"雨伞下的人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"69950018169","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sti 四岁那年，我被拐卖到一个被诅咒的村子，成为活人祭品，幸得狐仙拼死相救，暗自许下终身。
为娶狐妻，我深入苗人谷，脚踏冥河涧，行走阴阳界，亲身养蛊，深山赶尸，情动洞女， 智斗城隍，手刃鬼王，名震地府。
